case_title: WONG, RAYMOND et al vs. MELENDEZ, EDUARDO IND/DBA SASH AUTO BODY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, RAYMOND WONG, LORRAINE AS TO DEFENDANT MELENDEZ, EDUARDO IND/DBA SASH AUTO BODY CALDERON, RONY IND/DBA RONY'S AUTO REPAIR DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MELENDEZ, EDUARDO IND/DBA SASH AUTO BODY CALDERON, RONY IND/DBA RONY'S AUTO REPAIR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2146 FOLSOM ST. S. F. CA., DEFTS. SHALL RETURN POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES TO PLTFF. AS OF 5/31/01, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH AS TO THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
